name: claude-autopilot
description: Project scaffolding, auditing, and intelligent tool discovery for Claude Code. Generates router-pattern CLAUDE.md files, detects instruction contradictions, and recommends tools across 7 categories.

hooks.prompt: Before ending this session, update .claude/status.md with a brief summary: what was done, what's next, any blockers. Set 'Last updated' to today's date. If task statuses changed, update .claude/tasks.md. If new files or directories were created, update .claude/filemap.md.
